description: peer-receive --format json with one unread message emits a single-element JSON array with {id, from_cwd, from_label, body, created_at}.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z'); INSERT INTO inbox (to_cwd, to_label, from_cwd, from_label, body, created_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', '__CWD__', 'beta', 'hello world', '2020-01-02T00:00:00Z');
